name: Dubmare - Sniper with a Fat Ass
description:
"Shane Dawson is like if Tobuscus was woke. Shane Dawson is like bad ending Brandon Rogers. Shane Dawson is like if Jacksfilms was a pervert."

- Chazington in the Smiley video

Contents: Facesitting, non-consensual tranquilizing, metal gear reference (ask about her sneaking suit)

I got nothinggg so I'll make dubmare like everyone else fucking has. You guys like big capable bitches, right?

So yeah, she's a sniper here. She catches you off-guard and decides to tranq you rather than kirk you out. When you wake up, you're tied up at her scout post, and she starts calling you her "field relief."

I really like this dumbass dark souls text generator, expect more images to have it at some point.

Also, GUYS GUYS MGS4 WILL BE FREED FROM THE PS3 PRISON. AUGUST CAN'T COME SOON ENOUGH.
